name: The Great Mikanko Ceremony
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>伝</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>でん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>承</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>大</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>おお</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>御巫</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>みかんこ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Special Summon 1 "Mikanko" monster from your hand, ignoring its Summoning conditions, but return it to the hand during your opponent's End Phase. During your Main Phase: You can banish this card from your GY; send 1 "Mikanko" card from your Deck to the GY, except "The Great Mikanko Ceremony". You can only use each effect of "The Great Mikanko Ceremony" once per turn.
eff: Special Summon 1 "Mikanko" monster from your hand, ignoring its Summoning conditions, but return it to the hand during your opponent's End Phase. During your Main Phase: You can banish this card from your GY; send 1 "Mikanko" card from your Deck to the GY, except "The Great Mikanko Ceremony". You can only use each effect of "The Great Mikanko Ceremony" once per turn.

action: Returns from your field to your hand
Sends from your Deck to your Graveyard
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
